title: Google's New AI Architecture Changes Everything (Gemma 4 12B)
summary: Gemma 4 12B is Google DeepMind's new multimodal LLM that processes images and audio by reading raw pixels and waveforms directly instead of using separate encoder models. The architecture eliminates the need for intermediate vision and audio encoders, enabling faster offline inference on consumer hardware like Apple Silicon.
